0"},"children":["The AI avatar technology powering this revolution has evolved rapidly. Early deepfake applications focused on face-swapping existing videos. Today's systems create entirely new content from text inputs, using sophisticated neural networks trained on massive datasets of human expressions, gestures, and speech patterns."]}],["$","h3","45",{"style":{"fontSize":"24px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"36px","marginBottom":"16px","color":"#22d3ee"},"children":"Core Technologies"}],["$","h4","47",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"1. Facial Cloning & Reconstruction"}],["$","p","48",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Modern systems like Guiji AI's DUIX ONE model can create a digital twin from just 1 second of video or a single photograph. The technology maps facial features with sub-millimeter precision, capturing micro-expressions, skin texture, and even individual pores. The latest Avatar IV models achieve 92% accuracy in replicating natural facial movements."]}],["$","h4","50",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"2. Voice Synthesis & Cloning"}],["$","p","51",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Beyond visual appearance, these systems clone voices with remarkable fidelity. Users can speak naturally in their native language, and the AI will synchronize lip movements and generate translated audio in 175 languages while preserving the original vocal characteristics. Companies like 11labs provide the underlying voice technology that powers many avatar platforms."]}],["$","h4","53",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"3. Motion Generation"}],["$","p","54",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Advanced diffusion models now generate natural body movements, gestures, and expressions in real-time. Rather than relying on pre-recorded motion capture, AI predicts appropriate gestures based on the emotional content of the speech—creating the subtle head nods, hand movements, and posture shifts that make digital humans feel alive."]}],["$","div","63",{"style":{"overflowX":"auto","margin":"24px Understanding their approaches reveals different philosophies about the future of digital humans."]}],["$","h3","68",{"style":{"fontSize":"24px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"36px","marginBottom":"16px","color":"#22d3ee"},"children":"Guiji AI (硅基智能) — China's Digital Human Giant"}],["$","p","70",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Founded in 2017 by serial entrepreneur Sima Huapeng, Guiji AI has emerged as China's largest digital human company. According to CIC Consulting, Guiji AI holds ",["$","strong","1",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"32.2% of China's digital human market"}],"—ranking first domestically and second globally."]}],["$","p","72",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["The company's IPO filing in late 2025 revealed impressive growth: revenue increased from ¥223 million in 2022 to ¥655 million in 2024—a ",["$","strong","1",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"187% increase"}]," in just two years. With 80,000+ digital humans deployed across telecommunications, finance, healthcare, and education sectors, Guiji AI has created what it calls \"silicon-based labor force\" (硅基劳动力)."]}],["$","p","74",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["",["$","strong","1",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Key Innovation:"}]," The DUIX ONE multimodal model integrates appearance, voice, and emotional expression into a unified system. Unlike general-purpose LLMs, it's trained specifically for human-like interaction."]}],["$","p","76",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["",["$","strong","1",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Investor Profile:"}]," Tencent holds 16.59% (largest external shareholder), followed by CMB International (11.81%), and Guoxin Fund (6.74%). The company achieved unicorn status with a valuation of ",["$","strong","3",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"¥3.15 billion ($430 million)"}]," following its Series D round in May 2025."]}],["$","h3","78",{"style":{"fontSize":"24px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"36px","marginBottom":"16px","color":"#22d3ee"},"children":"HeyGen — The Cross-Border Champion"}],["$","p","80",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Developed by Chinese-founded but US-based诗云科技 (Shiyun Technology), HeyGen has become the go-to platform for international users. Its Avatar IV model, released in June 2025, represents the current state-of-the-art with 4K output and 92% motion naturalness scores."]}],["$","p","82",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["HeyGen's key differentiator is seamless localization. Users can create a video in English, then instantly generate versions in 175 languages with perfectly synchronized lip movements. This capability has made it indispensable for global businesses and creators targeting international audiences."]}],["$","p","84",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["The platform operates on a freemium model starting at $24/month, with enterprise solutions for larger organizations. For creators, they democratize access to video production. For society, they raise profound questions about authenticity, identity, and the nature of human connection in digital spaces."]}],["$","p","302",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["Guiji AI's IPO pursuit, HeyGen's international expansion, and the flood of new entrants suggest this market is still in its early stages. The technology will continue improving, costs will keep falling, and use cases will multiply."]}],["$","p","304",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["The faceless influencer is no longer an anomaly—they're the vanguard of a new media landscape where the barrier between human and digital creation dissolves. Whether this leads to a renaissance of creative expression or a dystopian flood of synthetic content depends on how we choose to deploy and regulate these powerful technologies."]}],["$","p","306",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["What's certain is that the avatar age has begun.
